text: This is a fan-made generator for the Warrior Cats book series by Erin Hunter.
You're welcome to use the characters and sprites generated in this program, as long as you don't claim the sprites as your own creations or sell them for any reason.
<i>(hover over a name to see their contributions!)
Thank you to the beta testers and all those who have helped with development.
Composed by Sharon Hurvitz and Carl-Isaak Krulewitch
Code is licensed under Mozilla Public License Version 2.0
The NotoSans font is (c) Google LLC, 2015-2021, licensed under the SIL Open Font License 1.1
The ClanGen font is comprised of the following open-source fonts:
- Perfect DOS VGA 437, created by Zeh Fernando - Latin uppercase, numbers and punctuation
- Abaddon Bold, created by Nathan Scott (@caffi_nate on itch.io) - Latin lowercase and punctuation
- Greybeard, ported by flowchartsman from UW ttyp0, created by Uwe Waldmann - Cyrillic
- All other symbols not specified are the work of ClanGen developers and artists, licensed under SIL Open Font License 1.1

-Former Senior Dev-

-Senior Dev-
UI migration to pygame_gui, fading cats, mediator role, mask-based tortie system, Singlestripe pelt, skill and trait rework

-Former Senior Dev-
Relationships (Base Code + Rework) / Interactions / Group Events, Poly-mates, adoptive parents, enhanced inheritance system, Injuries and Illnesses (Base Code), Pregnancy 'System', general Game-Code structure, Freshkill / Nutrition System

-Senior Dev-
Lots of White Patches, Patrol Rework, Spritesheet Update (added paralyzed and sick sprites), Thought Rework, Misc Writing & Art Additions, Sprite Wrangler

Created original patrol code, events, and a lot of updates of the fan edit
